name: JSW Steel Limited
description: India's second-largest steel producer with high US market dependency. More aggressive growth strategy with higher leverage and concentrated export focus.
objectives: Protect US market share as primary growth channel (critical for debt servicing)
Maintain production capacity utilization above 85% to cover fixed costs
Achieve revenue growth target of 12% annually despite tariff headwinds
Preserve investment-grade credit rating to refinance maturing debt
constraints: Debt covenants restrict new capital expenditure above $500 million without board approval
Higher US dependency means tariff shock is existential, not manageable
Limited cash reserves constrain ability to absorb margin compression
No international subsidiaries to provide geographic hedging options
